steps.title: Find the perpendicular slope
steps.content:
From the graph, line $k$ has slope $-\frac{3}{4}$. A perpendicular line has the negative reciprocal slope:
$$
m_j=\frac{4}{3}
$$

steps.title: Use the given point
steps.content:
Line $j$ passes through $(-15,-28)$, so substitute that point into $y=\frac{4}{3}x+b$:
$$
-28=\frac{4}{3}(-15)+b
$$
$$
-28=-20+b
$$
$$
b=-8
$$

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content: The equation is $$ y=\frac{4}{3}x-8 $$ The answer is A.
